summary: Made two surgical seam edits: one early bridge to carry forward Chapter 6's canceled donor-facing setup into the storm-prep scene, and one late line adjustment to hand off more cleanly into Chapter 8's shelter/consequence framing.
edits: Added a brief opening bridge noting Mina will not be back on the bright deck at four because the weather has overtaken the schedule.
Adjusted the final reflective line so the chapter exits on the cost of shelter, aligning more directly with Chapter 8's opening emotional frame.
